meaning: n.重复,反复vt.重做,复述,向他人转述,复制,使再现vi.重复,留有味道
examples: The joke is too rude to repeat.
'Is it a new series?' 'No, a repeat'.
The claims are, I repeat, totally unfounded.
But attempting a repeat, he holed out tamely to deep mid-wicket to fall for 50.
Perhaps history will repeat itself, and the U.S. will abandon one of its most disastrous policy experiments.
